context: Agent must produce an adapter that correctly translates between the domain ILogger interface and the LegacyLogger API

checklist.name: LegacyLoggerAdapter implements ILogger
checklist.description: LegacyLoggerAdapter.ts declares 'implements ILogger' and has info, warn, and error methods

checklist.name: info maps to LegacyLogger.log with INFO level
checklist.description: The info method calls this.legacy.log('INFO', message, ...) or equivalent

checklist.name: warn maps to LegacyLogger.log with WARN level
checklist.description: The warn method calls this.legacy.log('WARN', message, ...) or equivalent

checklist.name: error maps to LegacyLogger.logError
checklist.description: The error method calls this.legacy.logError(message, error, ...) rather than this.legacy.log with ERROR level

checklist.name: LegacyLogger accepted via constructor
checklist.description: LegacyLoggerAdapter accepts a LegacyLogger instance as a constructor parameter (not instantiated inside the adapter)

checklist.name: adapter-analysis.md correctly explains the pattern choice
checklist.description: adapter-analysis.md identifies the interface mismatch as the problem and explains the adapter preserves domain interface semantics without changing behavior
